desperate: Well... I'm sure you'll figure it out as you go.

bold: Hmm. Well, enthusiasm counts for something.

urgent: No time to worry about that now. Just go.

somber: It's alright. Not everything depends on that.

conspiratorial: We'll have to compensate for that. Be extra careful.

conflicted: That's... honest. I appreciate you not pretending.
